creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #2)
> Any specific reason for requesting maintainership ?

I already maintain some netcdf stuff (science/netcdf*). science/py-netCDF4 is the python binding. Thus I would like to maintain this port and keep it up-to-date.

BTW, I'll commit this PR first (except MAINTAINER change).
